mapper.select: SELECT eu.id AS equipment_unit_id, eu.display_code FROM equipment_units eu WHERE eu.product_id = #{productId} AND eu.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inventory_reservations r WHERE r.equipment_unit_id = eu.id AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AND r.start_at < #{endAt} AND r.end_at > #{startAt} ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rental_orders o WHERE o.equipment_unit_id = eu.id AND o.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND o.start_at < #{endAt} AND o.end_at > #{startAt} ) ORDER BY eu.id ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
